name: Sydney Film Festival
description: Australia's premier film festival featuring world premieres, international competition films, retrospectives, and special events across Sydney.

name: Revelation Perth International Film Festival
description: One of Australia's longest-running independent film festivals, showcasing bold and boundary-pushing cinema from around the world.

name: Japanese Film Festival
description: Celebrating the best of contemporary and classic Japanese cinema, from anime blockbusters to intimate dramas.

name: Melbourne International Film Festival
description: One of the oldest film festivals in the world, MIFF showcases the best in international and Australian cinema with 300+ films across 18 days.
